records.question: Which jobs where the title is Sales Representative had employees named Mattea Marvins with phone number 011.44.1346.329268 who were hired on or after 1987-08-20, earned a salary of at least 7200, had a commission percentage of at least 0.1, and whose job history ended exactly on 1998-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
WHERE job_history.end_date = '1998-12-31' AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND employees.hire_date >= '1987-08-20' AND employees.salary >= 7200 AND employees.commission_pct >= 0.1 AND employees.last_name = 'Marvins' AND employees.first_name = 'Mattea' AND employees.phone_number = '011.44.1346.329268'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
WHERE j.JOB_TITLE = 'Sales Representative'
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM employees e
  WHERE e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID
  AND e.HIRE_DATE >= '1987-08-20'
  AND e.SALARY >= 7200
  AND e.COMMISSION_PCT >= 0.1
  AND e.LAST_NAME = 'Marvins'
  AND e.FIRST_NAME = 'Mattea'
  AND e.PHONE_NUMBER = '011.44.1346.329268'
)
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM job_history jh
  WHERE jh.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID
  AND jh.END_DATE = '1998-12-31'
)

records.question: Which jobs have a minimum salary that is exactly 9000?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
WHERE jobs.min_salary = 9000
records.pred_sql: SELECT JOB_ID FROM jobs WHERE MIN_SALARY = 9000

records.question: What jobs with the title Sales Representative have a min_salary of 6000 and max_salary of 12000, where the employee’s phone number is 011.44.1343.629268, email is WSMITH, and hire date is on or after 1987-08-27?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
WHERE jobs.min_salary = 6000 AND jobs.max_salary = 12000 AND employees.phone_number = '011.44.1343.629268' AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND employees.hire_date >= '1987-08-27' AND employees.email = 'WSMITH'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
INNER JOIN employees e ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID
WHERE j.MIN_SALARY = 6000
  AND j.MAX_SALARY = 12000
  AND j.JOB_TITLE = 'Sales Representative'
  AND e.PHONE_NUMBER = '011.44.1343.629268'
  AND e.HIRE_DATE >= '1987-08-27'
  AND e.EMAIL = 'WSMITH'

records.question: Which jobs where the job_title is Sales Representative in the Sales department have a min_salary of at least 6000, a max_salary of at most 12000, and had job history starting on or after 1998-03-24 and ending on or after 1998-12-31?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
JOIN departments ON job_history.department_id = departments.department_id
WHERE departments.department_name = 'Sales' AND job_history.end_date >= '1998-12-31' AND jobs.min_salary >= 6000 AND job_history.start_date >= '1998-03-24' AND jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND jobs.max_salary <= 12000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
WHERE j.MIN_SALARY >= 6000
  AND j.JOB_TITLE = 'Sales Representative'
  AND j.MAX_SALARY <= 12000
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM job_history jh
    WHERE jh.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID
      AND jh.END_DATE >= '1998-12-31'
      AND jh.START_DATE >= '1998-03-24'
      AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM departments d
        WHERE d.DEPARTMENT_ID = jh.DEPARTMENT_ID
          AND d.DEPARTMENT_NAME = 'Sales'
      )
  )

records.question: Which jobs have the title Sales Representative with a minimum salary at most 6000 and a maximum salary no more than 12000?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
WHERE jobs.job_title = 'Sales Representative' AND jobs.max_salary <= 12000 AND jobs.min_salary <= 6000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT JOB_ID
FROM jobs
WHERE JOB_TITLE = 'Sales Representative' AND MAX_SALARY <= 12000 AND MIN_SALARY <= 6000

records.question: Which jobs offer a maximum salary of at least 5000 and have employees with the email IMIKKILI earning at least 2700 and a commission percentage of at most 0.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
WHERE jobs.max_salary >= 5000 AND employees.salary >= 2700 AND employees.email = 'IMIKKILI' AND employees.commission_pct <= 0.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
WHERE j.MAX_SALARY >= 5000
AND EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM employees e
  WHERE e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID
  AND e.SALARY >= 2700
  AND e.EMAIL = 'IMIKKILI'
  AND (e.COMMISSION_PCT <= 0.0 OR e.COMMISSION_PCT IS NULL)
)

records.question: Which jobs have employees earning a salary of at least 6900?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
WHERE employees.salary >= 6900
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
INNER JOIN employees e ON j.JOB_ID = e.JOB_ID
WHERE e.SALARY >= 6900

records.question: Which jobs have employees hired exactly on 1987-07-24 with a commission percentage of exactly 0.0, where the job history started on or before 1999-01-01 and ended on or after 1999-12-31, and the minimum salary is at most 2000?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
WHERE employees.hire_date = '1987-07-24' AND job_history.start_date <= '1999-01-01' AND job_history.end_date >= '1999-12-31' AND employees.commission_pct = 0.0 AND jobs.min_salary <= 2000
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
WHERE j.MIN_SALARY <= 2000
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM employees e
    WHERE e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID
    AND e.HIRE_DATE = '1987-07-24'
    AND e.COMMISSION_PCT = 0.0
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM job_history jh
    WHERE jh.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID
    AND jh.START_DATE <= '1999-01-01'
    AND jh.END_DATE >= '1999-12-31'
)

records.question: Which jobs have the exact title Accounting Manager and have been held by employees in their job history?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
JOIN employees ON job_history.employee_id = employees.employee_id
WHERE jobs.job_title = 'Accounting Manager'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
INNER JOIN job_history jh ON j.JOB_ID = jh.JOB_ID
INNER JOIN employees e ON jh.EMPLOYEE_ID = e.EMPLOYEE_ID
WHERE j.JOB_TITLE = 'Accounting Manager'

records.question: Which jobs had employees earning at least 4800 and also started on 1993-01-13 according to their job history?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT jobs.job_id FROM jobs
JOIN employees ON jobs.job_id = employees.job_id
JOIN job_history ON jobs.job_id = job_history.job_id
WHERE job_history.start_date = '1993-01-13' AND employees.salary >= 4800
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT j.JOB_ID
FROM jobs j
WHERE EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM employees e 
    WHERE e.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID 
    AND e.SALARY >= 4800
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 
    FROM job_history jh 
    WHERE jh.JOB_ID = j.JOB_ID 
    AND jh.START_DATE = '1993-01-13'
)
